name: All-Rust Hi-C pipeline
summary: Add a shell pipeline that uses Rust commands for the implemented pairtools front and downstream surface.
goal: Replace the hybrid shell pipeline with a guarded all-Rust command chain for parse, sort, merge, dedup, select, split, and stats where scoped implementations exist.
explicit_non_goals: Do not claim production parity before M161.
Do not add new pairtools command behavior in Rust.
Do not benchmark or claim speedup.
Do not call Python pairtools from Rust runtime.
oracle_commands: Not applicable at runtime; pairtools comparisons belong in M161 validation.
acceptance_criteria: Dry-run plan contains only `pairs-rs` for pairtools-equivalent commands.
The pipeline preserves the existing production output contract names.
The docs state that parity still depends on M161 real-data oracle validation.
known_risks: Scoped command implementations may not yet cover every production option used by legacy pairtools pipelines.
